title: Mildly Grassy Portuguese New Potatoes Pasta
description: A low-carb friendly Portuguese dish featuring new potatoes and a light pasta water emulsion, perfect for a post-workout meal. This recipe combines the natural sweetness of new potatoes with the freshness of parsley and grassy notes of asparagus.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to the package instructions until al dente.
Reserve 1 cup of pasta water before draining the spaghetti.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the garlic until fragrant.
Add the asparagus to the skillet and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the diced new potatoes to the skillet and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Stir in the chopped parsley and cook for 1 minute.
In a small bowl, whisk together the chicken broth and reserved pasta water to create a light emulsion.
Add the emulsion to the skillet and stir to combine with the potato and asparagus mixture.
Add the cooked pasta to the skillet, tossing to combine with the sauce and potato mixture.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste, then serve hot topped with grated cheese.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
